requirements.text: Add counter usage_extraction_failures_total for malformed usage dicts
requirements.acceptance: Counter increments when _extract_usage returns (0,0) for non-empty input; visible in /metrics output
Counter increments when _persist_state catches an exception; visible in /metrics output
Counter increments when _hydrate_from_db catches an exception; visible in /metrics output

requirements.text: Add counter ws_broadcast_failures_total for failed WebSocket sends
requirements.acceptance: Counter increments per failed client in ConnectionManager._safe_send; visible in /metrics output

requirements.text: Add counter ws_dead_clients_total for dead client removals
requirements.acceptance: Counter increments when a dead client is removed in ConnectionManager._safe_send; visible in /metrics output

requirements.text: Add gauge ws_active_connections for current WebSocket client count
requirements.acceptance: Gauge reflects ConnectionManager.count; visible in /metrics output

requirements.text: All new metrics use existing custom REGISTRY
requirements.acceptance: New metrics registered in _init_metrics() alongside existing metrics
Counter .inc() calls safe for concurrent hook calls
Each new metric has at least one test verifying increment/set behavior

requirements.text: Backward compatible with existing tests and Prometheus output
requirements.acceptance: Existing tests pass; existing /metrics output unchanged

success_criteria: All 6 new metrics visible in /metrics output with HELP and TYPE metadata
Error counters increment when error conditions occur
No regressions in existing Prometheus output
